case_title: GORDON/CLIFFORD REALTY, INC. vs. KEMAL, AKEMESE IND/DBA KEMAL CUSTOM WOODWORKING et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEMAL, AKEMESE IND/DBA KEMAL CUSTOM WOODWORKING THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TREAT, GROUND FLOOR, S.F. $2,800.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,400.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-10-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, END OF BUSINESS DAY. DEFT AGREES TO PAY $1200- RENT FOR 4/97 & 5/97 PLUS DAMAGES AT $40- PER DAY FOR 10 DAYS IN JUNE AND $600 FOR ATTY FEES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR PAYMENT SCHEDULE AND DETAILS. IF DEFT DEFAULTS PLTF WITH 24 HRS NOTICE TO DEFT MAY SEEK FULL AMT TO BE PAID. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS.
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON MAY-13-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON/CLIFFORD REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KEMAL, AKEMESE IND/DBA KEMAL CUSTOM WOODWORKING DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET RETURNED TO DEFT'S ATTY-STATED CASE NOT AT ISSUE
